hero.title: Take control of your money,
hero.subtitle: Track your spending in real time, let the
hero.subtitle3: split your budget automatically, and reach your savings goals effortlessly.

problem.title: Managing your money shouldn't be a headache
problem.subtitle: Three everyday problems Luxa solves, without complexity or judgment.

items.title: Blurry budget
items.pain: You never really know where your money went by the end of the month.
items.solution: Luxa tracks every expense in real time and splits your budget with the 50/30/20 method.

items.title: Hard to save
items.pain: Putting money aside stays a wish, with no tracking or clear goal.
items.solution: Create savings goals and watch your progress automatically, in real time.

items.title: Financial stress
items.pain: Classic banking apps feel cold, austere, and guilt-inducing.
items.solution: Luxa is built to reassure: an elegant interface, a warm tone, zero judgment.

features.title: Everything you need to take back control
features.subtitle: Features designed to simplify your financial life, never to complicate it.

budgetMethod.title: 50/30/20 Method
budgetMethod.description: Your income is automatically split between needs, wants and savings, no math required.

savingsGoals.title: Savings Goals
savingsGoals.description: Create goals, track your progress in real time and stay motivated until the end.

multiCurrency.title: 26 Currencies
multiCurrency.description: Manage your budget in the currency of your choice, wherever you are in the world.

multiLanguage.title: 9 Languages
multiLanguage.description: Luxa adapts to you: choose your language from 9 available options.

security.title: Biometric Security
security.description: Sign in with fingerprint, Face ID, or via Google and Apple. Your data belongs to you.

darkMode.title: OLED Dark Mode
darkMode.description: An elegant interface in daylight, and a deep black that's easy on your eyes at night.

howItWorks.title: Three steps, and you're set
howItWorks.subtitle: Luxa fits into your routine in just a few minutes.

steps.title: Sign in securely
steps.description: Create your account with email or biometric sign-in, in just a few seconds.

steps.title: Visualize your budget
steps.description: The 50/30/20 rule automatically splits your income between needs, wants and savings.

steps.title: Reach your goals
steps.description: Track your progress in real time and save without even thinking about it.

screenshots.title: An interface designed for clarity
screenshots.subtitle: See what managing your budget with Luxa looks like.

items.title: Dashboard
items.description: Your balance, this week's spending and recent transactions, at a glance.

items.title: Transaction History
items.description: Browse month by month and spot your spending habits with the calendar view.

items.title: 50/30/20 Pockets
items.description: Needs, wants and savings, automatically split and tracked in real time.

testimonials.title: They transformed their finances
testimonials.subtitle: Discover how Luxa helps thousands of users save more and spend better.

items.name: Sophie Martin
items.text: Luxa completely transformed my financial management. I saved 30% more in just 3 months thanks to the 50-30-20 method. The interface is beautiful and super intuitive.

items.name: Thomas Dubois
items.text: As a developer, I appreciate Luxa's security and transparency. Automatic subscription tracking saved me €150/month by canceling ones I no longer used.

items.name: Emma Lefebvre
items.text: I love being able to manage my budget in multiple currencies without any hassle. Shared savings goals helped us save for our vacation in 6 months.

items.name: Lucas Bernard
items.text: Even with a tight student budget, Luxa helps me stay in control. The free version is already super complete, and AI insights taught me better money management.

items.name: Marie Rousseau
items.text: Luxa became essential for my business. I easily separate personal and professional finances. CSV reports are perfect for my accountant!

items.name: Alexandre Petit
items.text: Clear interface, smart notifications, and most importantly: my data is secure. Luxa is the budget app I recommend to all my colleagues.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Luxa. Can't find your answer? Contact our team.

items.question: Is Luxa free?
items.answer: Yes, Luxa is currently 100% free during the beta, with access to all essential features. Premium options will arrive later, without taking anything away from the current experience.

items.question: Is there a mobile app available?
items.answer: Luxa is currently in beta and will be available soon on both iOS (App Store) and Android (Google Play). Join our waitlist to get early access and be notified as soon as we launch!

items.question: Is my financial data secure?
items.answer: Yes. Luxa protects your account with biometric authentication (Face ID, fingerprint) or secure Google/Apple sign-in. Your data is never sold or shared.

items.question: What languages and currencies does Luxa support?
items.answer: Luxa is available in 9 languages and supports 26 different currencies, so it fits your life wherever you are in the world.

roadmap.title: Our Vision for the Future
roadmap.subtitle: Discover Luxa's development stages and upcoming features.

items.title: Beta App
items.description: Beta version available now! Test the app early and share your feedback to help us create the best possible experience.

items.title: Published App
items.description: Official release on App Store and Google Play with all premium features. Access advanced analytics, unlimited savings goals, and much more.

items.title: Web Version
items.description: Manage your finances from any device with our complete web interface. Real-time sync, access from your computer, and an optimized experience on all screens.

items.title: Budget for Two
items.description: Manage finances together as a couple or family. Create shared budgets, track common expenses, and reach your goals together with complete transparency.

cta.title: It's time to take control of your finances.
cta.subtitle: Luxa helps you save more, spend better and reach your goals faster — without stress, without judgment.

footer.description: The app that helps you take control of your money, without the stress.
